title: Optimized ERC20 approve with inline slot computation and event emission
explanation: Memory at 0x00-0x3f (scratch space) is reused across the slot computation and the event emission. After sstore, amount is written to 0x00 and the spender address already at 0x2c is extracted with shr(96) for the log3 topic — zero additional memory allocation needed.
when_not_to_apply: Tokens with approval callbacks, ERC777-style operators
